caption: Hey guys, I'm Maya and there's nothing better than waking up to sun-kissed skin on the streets of Santorini! ☀️ The spring breeze and the salty air make me feel absolutely free, like I'm living my most carefree, indulgent version of life. Wearing just enough to feel confident and sexy without trying too hard... because sometimes, you just want to embrace the warmth. 🌺🍹 #SantoriniSun #SpringVibes #TravelMode
